lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: First day in school in a long time. Better start off on a the right foot..

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Lets see what the guys are up to.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: when youre ready to start your school day sit at your table: second row, second column

menu_entry.text: |School days take up most of the day. Make sure to do everything you needed to do before going to school.|
I hate this place. School is like prison just less criminals and more insecure and power-hungry teachers. Especially Miss Carter.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Okay everyone!

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Please sit down at your desks.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Seems like everybodys here..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: So lets start the lesson.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Miss carter, the history teacher, a well mannered but just as strict teacher

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Better not stand out too much

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Anybody willing to take the hit and volunteer for the oral exam?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: everybody acts like theyre didnt hear her

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Oh what a surprise..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: You know, its not that hard to study and come prepared people!

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: If you applied yourself at home, you wouldnt have to be sweating right now..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well, if nobody want to be the tribute today. Im afraid Ill have to chose one of you myself..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: It doesnt bring me any satisfaction to do this, but you left me no choice.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Lets do it the old fashion way.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Its the mopst fair. Ill add up the day of the month, the month of the year..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: And decrease by the amount of empty seats.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: That comes up to number three.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Lets see..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: David. Is David here today?

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Yes..

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Everybody looks at David.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Jake looks at you from the table in front of you.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: Thats the new guy right? The one everybodys talking about?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: He looks like a weirdo. Where is he-

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Jake, would you like to replace David? With the amount of talking youre currently doing it would seem so.

lines.speaker: jake
lines.text: No miss carter. Im sorry. Please continue.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well david. Come up here so that i can hear you better.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Im old Im afraid and you speak very soflty.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: David slowly gets up. Its clear the stress is not coming from the lack of knowledge but the amount of attention drawn to him.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: He trips over himself as he shuffles towards the whiteboard

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: So lets start from the begining. Please tell us what we have gone through last week?

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Its chapter 7 young man..if you have studied you will surely recall.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: Im sorry but I..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Speak clearly, David.

lines.speaker: david
lines.text: My family just moved here and I didnt have the time to review the material for todays lesson.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well at least you took the time to come up with a good excuse.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: David..since youre new to my class, Ill explain how things work here.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Each day one person has to recap what we leared last lesson. They are graded for it according to how well they perform.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Since youre new, I will not give you an F. But I will remeber this performance of yours. And next time the pen lands on your name I wont be this merciful.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: And yes, this time I specificaly chose you instead of randomly choosing just to make it clear youre not excluded out of our raffle.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Go sit child.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: David looks like hes about to die. Sweat dripping, heart pounding.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: After todays recap the lesson proceeds further. Nothing of importance happenes

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well, Pupils. It seems that our time is up. Make sure to prepare yourself for the test next week.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: And dont forget to study for all the other subjects too! I dont want a situation like that one to happen again.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Miss carter was smiling and energetic even after an hour of teaching. She clearly enjoys her work.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Okay everyone!

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Please sit down at your desks.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Seems like everybodys here..

lines.speaker: neutral

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Well, Pupils. It seems that our time is up.

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Dont forget to study! A mind needs books like a..

lines.speaker: teacher
lines.text: Uhh..well- a minds needs books thats for certain.
